title: On The Collar Of Tiger, Mrs. Dingley's Lap-Dog
content:
Pray steal me not; I'm Mrs. Dingley's,
    Whose heart in this four-footed thing lies.
meaning:
"On The Collar Of Tiger, Mrs. Dingley's Lap-Dog" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
